plugins.name: p-wiki
plugins.description: Persistent markdown knowledge wiki under docs/wiki/. Skills: init, ingest, compile, query, lint.

plugins.name: p-flow
plugins.description: Workflow rules for Claude: deny-permissions for secrets, Conventional Commits + <type>/<slug> branches, spec templates. Skills: init.

plugins.description: Task tracker (task → sub-task) with FS and Jira destinations, one-way sync. Skills: init, add, set, next, summary, sync.
